ec2.launchtemplate.placement.CfnAbout:
Specifies the placement of an instance.

`Placement` is a property of [AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate LaunchTemplateData](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-ec2-launchtemplate-launchtemplatedata.html).

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.Affinity.Description: The affinity setting for an instance on a Dedicated Host.

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.Availabilit.Description: The Availability Zone for the instance.

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.GroupId.Description: The Group Id of a placement group. You must specify the Placement Group **Group Id** to launch an instance in a shared placement group.

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.GroupName.Description: The name of the placement group for the instance.

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.HostId.Description: The ID of the Dedicated Host for the instance.

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.HostResourc.Description: The ARN of the host resource group in which to launch the instances. If you specify a host resource group ARN, omit the **Tenancy** parameter or set it to `host`.

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.PartitionNu.Description: The number of the partition the instance should launch in. Valid only if the placement group strategy is set to `partition`.

ec2.launchtemplate.placement.Tenancy.Description: The tenancy of the instance. An instance with a tenancy of dedicated runs on single-tenant hardware.
